## Governance Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, account IDs, registrant details, or private ownership metadata are committed.
- [ ] Domain-specific values are read from `PUBLIC_` environment variables.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior, operations, or governance expectations change.
- [ ] Accessibility and responsive behavior were considered.
- [ ] Future IaC implications were considered and TODOs added where useful.
